name: @memberjunction/remote-browser-selfhost
description: MemberJunction: Self-Hosted Chrome backend driver for the Remote Browser channel. Connects the shared CDP control kit to a lightweight MJ-orchestrated headless-Chrome container (raw CDP control, MJ-hosted live view backed by the screencast, human takeover, screen streaming, persistent context, multi-tab, file downloads — no native AI control) via an injectable Chrome-container-runner seam, so the driver builds and unit-tests with no container, no network, and no real browser.
author: MemberJunction.com
